ncs_standard_definition.description_short: Agritech Product Manager is responsible for developing and launching innovative agricultural products and services that improve crop yields, reduce costs, and enhance farmer experiences.
ncs_standard_definition.description_detailed: The role involves market research, product development, testing, and launch planning, as well as collaboration with cross-functional teams, including farmers, suppliers, and internal stakeholders.

first_stepper.description: High school students interested in agriculture and technology can pursue a degree in agriculture, computer science, or a related field.

choice_maker.description: Individuals with a generic degree can pursue certifications or bridge courses in agriculture, data science, or product management to transition into the agritech sector.

future_builder.description: Agritech professionals with 2-5 years of experience can advance to senior roles by developing advanced skills in data analysis, machine learning, and product development.

problem_solver_uturn.description: Individuals from unrelated fields can transition into agritech by developing relevant skills and building a portfolio of projects that demonstrate their ability to solve agricultural problems.
portfolio_proof_required: Farm Management System with Mobile App

roadmap.title: Capstone & Portfolio
topics: Build an Agritech Project with IoT Sensors
